category_sources: source_facts.description says it displays the phase of the moon via ASCII art.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is phoon; official ACME homepage title/path uses phoon.
docs_sources: Official ACME phoon homepage is the best available documentation surface and source archive page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ACME homepage and source archive identify release tarballs but no official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a CLI that renders moon phases as ASCII art.
